title: RTK as recommended-default output compressor
commands_run: bin/panoply gen brewfile > config/Brewfile && bin/panoply gen brewfile --check
PANOPLY_RTK=1 PANOPLY_HOME=$PWD zsh -c 'source config/shell/rtk.zsh; type git; type grep'
outcome: RTK wired as the recommended-default, swappable output compressor. Manifest gained an `agent` module (rtk default=true brew=rtk; qmd default=false detect-only, complementary retrieval — not a swap); Brewfile regenerated (+`# agent`/`brew "rtk"`); `agent` added to the descriptor modules. Routing lives in config/shell/rtk.zsh: a no-op unless rtk is installed AND PANOPLY_RTK=1, activates only when rtk exposes a `gain` subcommand (rules out reachingforthejack/rtk), and conservatively wraps only read-only/high-output subcommands (git status|diff|log|show|branch|blame, grep/rg) — mutating/interactive commands run raw, `command <tool>` is the escape hatch. panoply.zsh sources it unless PANOPLY_RTK_MANAGED=1; the chezmoi fragment dot_config/zsh/rtk.zsh.tmpl sets PANOPLY_RTK from profile data (`rtk` flag), exports PANOPLY_RTK_MANAGED=1, and sources the same layer. profiles.toml `rtk=true` for all four classes (explicitly incl. local-macos-full + agent-safe per the epic). Docs updated (tool-catalog RTK -> recommended-default + legend; native-toolchain agent row + 'Output compression (RTK)' subsection; README modules line + RTK note).
validation: GATE: `panoply gen brewfile --check` PASS (rtk included). RTK identity verified (which rtk=/opt/homebrew/bin/rtk, rtk 0.42.4, gain present -> no Rust-Type-Kit collision). rtk.zsh sources clean: PANOPLY_RTK=1 defines git/grep functions (PANOPLY_RTK_ACTIVE=1); PANOPLY_RTK=0 leaves raw binaries. dotfiles validate.sh PASS (rtk.zsh.tmpl balanced + 12 chezmoi renders incl. rtk template added to the loop). rtk.zsh.tmpl renders PANOPLY_RTK=1 for local-macos-full/agent-safe/headless-dev. shellcheck CLEAN.
decisions: rtk and qmd are NOT mutual alternatives (compression vs retrieval are different roles); rtk alternatives left empty — its swappability is the PANOPLY_RTK toggle + profile `rtk` flag, documented, not a sibling tool
routing wraps only read-only/high-output subcommands via case-guards so interactive/mutating commands are never shadowed; full transparent rewriting stays the Claude Code hook's job
agent module appended at manifest end to keep the Brewfile diff minimal and gen --check stable across stories
rtk gain baseline recorded in this session record + native-toolchain.md (the registry tools.json is host-specific/gitignored, so the tracked record is the durable home)
token_note: loaded 1 story block + RTK.md + STATE/ledger tail; baseline shows 44.8% output savings already (the headline M0 lever now wired as default)
